name: Michelle Wolf
blurb: She wrote for Late Night with Seth Meyers and was a correspondent on The Daily Show before launching her own specials and the short-lived Netflix series The Break.
bio: Michelle Wolf is an American stand-up comedian and writer known for sharp, fast-paced political and feminist material. She wrote for Late Night with Seth Meyers and was a correspondent on The Daily Show before launching her own specials and the short-lived Netflix series The Break. She drew national attention for her performance at the 2018 White House Correspondents Dinner.

timeline.ev: Begins writing for Late Night with Seth Meyers
Becomes correspondent on The Daily Show
Headlines the White House Correspondents Dinner

accolades: Featured performer at the 2018 White House Correspondents Dinner
Three hour-long specials across HBO and Netflix
Hosted the Netflix talk series The Break with Michelle Wolf

bits.t: Has A Name For Male Tampons
